title: Chocohugs Chocolate Gift Hamper Box | Filled with Assortment of Dairy Milk Selections | Box of Chocolates | Sweet Treat Gift Box | Assorted Dairy Milk Chocolate Selection Box Gift Hamper
features: Make their Day Extra Special : Our Dairy Milk Chocolate Gift Hamper Box is more than just a gift—it’s a heartfelt way to express your affection and appreciation. Delight your friends, family, or colleagues with this assorted chocolate gift box that will bring joy and make their day brighter
Beautifully Presented: Our Luxury looking boxes are foil-printed for an elegant touch that makes a lasting impression
Perfect Assortment: Includes the all time favourite most popular Dairy milk Chocolates

Letterbox Friendly: Perfectly sized at 160mm x 220mm x 20mm, our Standard Gift Box is designed to fit seamlessly through letterboxes, offering a hassle-free gifting experience for both sender and recipient. Say goodbye to the hassle of traditional deliveries and hello to chocolate-filled surprises, delivered with ease.
description: From the brand Previous page Indulge in the extraordinary world of Chocohugs, where every bite is a moment of pure bliss. Our Chocohugs creations are perfect for all occasions, making your celebrations extra special. At Chocohugs, we go beyond selling chocolates; we are architects of joy, delivering moments of sweetness that linger long after the last bite. Explore the magic of Chocohugs, where chocolate isn't just a treat-it's a heartfelt embrace. How we get our start? Chocohugs began with a passion for creating delightful chocolate hampers that spread joy, bring smiles to faces and warmth to hearts. Why we love what we do? We’re passionate about what we do because we believe in the power of chocolate to spread happiness and create lasting memories. Every time someone opens a Chocohugs hamper, we’re reminded of the joy we are privileged to be a part of. It’s more than just selling chocolates; it’s about sharing in the special moments of our customers’ lives and making them a little sweeter. Our Hampers Visit the store Next page
